title: InStem Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 03 Project Associate I and Lab Technician Posts
description: Institute for Stem Cell Biology and Regenerative Medicine (InStem) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for 03 Project Associate I and Lab Technician Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in Any Degree, post-graduation, can grab this opportunity and apply for the InStem Notification 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salarystructure, education details, application fee, and how to apply online for these posts. If you are looking for mor...
